h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner gradually internalizes the position rule for header/value.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Last check: `March` inside the row → ______. Fill that label, then submit.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: Tutor shifts to a fill-in-the-blank drill to address the learner's persistent word-pull habit.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn, so no later tutor uptake after learner re-framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn, so no later tutor uptake after learner re-framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: Last check: `March` inside the row → ______. Fill that label, then submit.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: Tutor shifts to a fill-in-the-blank drill to address the learner's persistent word-pull habit.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: Last check: `March` inside the row → ______. Fill that label, then submit.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: Tutor shifts to a fill-in-the-blank drill to address the learner's persistent word-pull habit.

scored.naiveTrajectory: After sorting labels and placing the three known arrow directions, the learner would simply confirm the diagram is complete.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor continues the same card-manipulation sequence without visibly taking stock of the learner's uncertainty about surface vs. table; no adaptive mechanism appears.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No later tutor turn exists after L3 to adapt to the friction question, so there is no uptake of the learner's revised framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No later tutor turn exists after L3 to adapt to the friction question, so there is no uptake of the learner's revised framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor continues the same card-manipulation sequence without visibly taking stock of the learner's uncertainty about surface vs. table; no adaptive mechanism appears.
